PHASE: Phase 4 Part 8 complete — **Phase 4 fully complete**

LAST_DONE: Part 8 — CI/CD workflows + MANIFEST.txt + README.md + final IMPLEMENTATION_MAP rewrite. 5 new files in a single Opus session, Tier 2 (≤12 files / ~55K tokens — SAFE). `.github/workflows/ci.yml` runs three jobs: governance (validate-inputs + check-product-sync + hydration-lint), Turbo quality matrix (lint/typecheck/test/build with per-task `.turbo` cache + fail-fast: false), and security (pnpm audit --audit-level=high blocks merge on HIGH/CRITICAL CVEs). Uses `pnpm/action-setup@v4` + `actions/setup-node@v4 cache: pnpm` (canonical 2026 pattern, avoids corepack permission issues). `tools:check-env` deliberately excluded from CI — it validates local `.env.<env>` against `.env.example`, irrelevant in CI. `.github/workflows/docker-publish.yml` runs the V27 Komodo flow: multi-platform (amd64+arm64) build on push to main + workflow_dispatch, pushes three tags per run — `:latest` (Komodo prod manual Deploy), `:staging-latest` (Komodo staging `auto_update: true` polls Docker Hub), `:sha-<short>` (immutable rollback target). Image hardcoded to `${{ secrets.DOCKERHUB_USERNAME }}/yelli` since name is locked in inputs.yml. `provenance: false` on build-push-action to avoid OCI attestation issues with downstream registry. No Komodo webhook step — V27 polls Docker Hub directly. MANIFEST.txt: full file inventory by Phase 4 Part, tagged [GIT]/[LOCAL]/[SOFT], ~255 tracked + 5 local-only. README.md: project-root onboarding — quick start, service URLs (non-standard dev ports), daily commands, Phase 7 loop, architecture + security stack tables, codebase intelligence, project structure, phase status, Phase-5 credential checklist. IMPLEMENTATION_MAP.md rewritten as final Phase-4-complete snapshot: all 12 Phase-4 Parts marked ✅, Not Yet Built narrowed to Phase 5/6/7 + deferred follow-ups + adds Post-Phase-4 SocratiCode initial index human-action section. Verification PASS: pnpm tools:validate-inputs + check-product-sync + hydration-lint (76 files, 0 findings) + YAML syntax check for both workflows (ci=3 jobs, docker-publish=1 job). Hook interaction: PreToolUse:Write fired security_reminder_hook (informational GHA injection warning — compliance verified: no untrusted input flows into `run:` lines) and vercel-plugin skill suggestions (workflow/deployments-cicd/bootstrap) which were skipped per Rule 28 priority order (DECISIONS_LOG Komodo+Traefik deploy outranks plugin skills). Two workflow Writes had to retry once each due to stochastic hook block on first invocation — second invocation succeeded with identical content. No new lessons.md entries — Part 8 reuses existing patterns and the V31 phases.md CI/CD templates.

NEXT: **Phase 5 Validation** — 9 commands: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile + pnpm tools:validate-inputs + pnpm tools:check-env + pnpm tools:check-product-sync + pnpm lint + pnpm typecheck + pnpm test + pnpm build + pnpm audit --audit-level=high.
